title: YO12 4TD, Broachdale Birds Limited: environmental permit issued – EPR/TP3627SJ/A001
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:    Operator name: Broachdale Birds Limited   Installation name: Staxton Hens   Permit number: EPR/TP3627SJ/A001   "
